ast.name: error
ast.source: unicode code point escapes greater than \u{10ffff} are not allowed
ast.target: 不允许大于 \u{10ffff} 的 Unicode 码点转义

ast.name: error
ast.source: yield can only occur inside functions
ast.target: yield 只能在函数内部出现

ast.name: error
ast.source: await can only occur inside functions
ast.target: await 只能在函数内部出现

ast.name: error
ast.source: tried to assign to unassignable value
ast.target: 尝试给不可赋值的值赋值

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected token. Allowed CSX attributes are: id="val", src={source}, {props...} or attribute.
ast.target: 意外的标记。允许的 CSX 属性为：id="val", src={source}, {props...} 或 attribute。

ast.name: error
ast.source: cannot use super outside of an instance method
ast.target: 不能在实例方法之外使用 super

ast.name: error
ast.source: cannot have an implicit value in an implicit object
ast.target: 隐式对象中不能有隐式值

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot define more than one constructor in a class
ast.target: 类中不能定义多个构造函数

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot define a constructor as a bound (fat arrow) function
ast.target: 不能将构造函数定义为绑定（胖箭头）函数

ast.name: error
ast.source: constructors must be defined at the top level of a class body
ast.target: 构造函数必须定义在类体的顶层

ast.name: error
ast.source: the name of the module to be imported from must be an uninterpolated string
ast.target: 要导入的模块名必须是未插值的字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: multiple splats/expansions are disallowed in an assignment
ast.target: 赋值中不允许多个 splat/展开

ast.name: error
ast.source: function can't contain both yield and await
ast.target: 函数不能同时包含 yield 和 await

ast.name: error
ast.source: Class constructor may not be async
ast.target: 类构造函数不能是 async

ast.name: error
ast.source: Class constructor may not be a generator
ast.target: 类构造函数不能是生成器

ast.name: error
ast.source: only one splat or expansion parameter is allowed per function definition
ast.target: 每个函数定义只允许一个 splat 或 expansion 参数

ast.name: error
ast.source: an expansion parameter cannot be the only parameter in a function definition
ast.target: expansion 参数不能是函数定义中的唯一参数

ast.name: error
ast.source: yield cannot occur inside bound (fat arrow) functions
ast.target: yield 不能出现在绑定（胖箭头）函数中

ast.name: error
ast.source: 'super' is not allowed in constructor parameter defaults
ast.target: 构造函数参数默认值中不允许使用 'super'

ast.name: error
ast.source: 'super' is only allowed in derived class constructors
ast.target: 'super' 只允许在派生类构造函数中使用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't use @params in derived class constructors without calling super
ast.target: 在派生类构造函数中未调用 super 时不能使用 @params

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call super with @params in derived class constructors
ast.target: 在派生类构造函数中不能用 @params 调用 super

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't reference 'this' before calling super in derived class constructors
ast.target: 在派生类构造函数中调用 super 之前不能引用 'this'

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expansion must be used inside a destructuring assignment or parameter list
ast.target: Expansion 必须在解构赋值或参数列表中使用

ast.name: error
ast.source: delete operand may not be argument or var
ast.target: delete 操作数不能是 argument 或 var

ast.name: error
ast.source: index cannot be a pattern matching expression
ast.target: index 不能是模式匹配表达式

ast.name: error
ast.source: indexes do not apply to range loops

ast.name: error
ast.source: cannot pattern match over range loops
ast.target: 不能在 range 循环中进行模式匹配

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 无法获取系统字体，已加载基础字体列表
ast.target: 无法获取系统字体，已加载基础字体列表

ast.name: content
desc
ast.source: Don't use width or height when using padding or border.
ast.target: 使用 padding 或 border 时不要使用 width 或 height。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use the bulletproof @font-face syntax to avoid 404's in old IE (http://www.fontspring.com/blog/the-new-bulletproof-font-face-syntax).
ast.target: 使用可靠的 @font-face 语法，避免旧版 IE 中出现 404（http://www.fontspring.com/blog/the-new-bulletproof-font-face-syntax）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Include all compatible vendor prefixes to reach a wider range of users.
ast.target: 包含所有兼容的厂商前缀，以覆盖更广泛的用户。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Certain properties shouldn't be used with certain display property values.
ast.target: 某些属性不应与某些 display 属性值一起使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Every background-image should be unique. Use a common class for e.g. sprites.
ast.target: 每个 background-image 都应唯一，例如精灵图请使用通用类。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Duplicate properties must appear one after the other.
ast.target: 重复的属性必须连续出现。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This rule looks for recoverable syntax errors.
ast.target: 此规则用于查找可恢复的语法错误。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This rule tests if the float property is used too many times
ast.target: 此规则用于检测 float 属性是否被使用过多次数

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Too many different web fonts in the same stylesheet.
ast.target: 同一样式表中使用了过多不同的网页字体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks the number of font-size declarations.
ast.target: 检查 font-size 声明的数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: IE6-9 supports up to 31 @import per stylesheet
ast.target: IE6-9 每个样式表最多支持 31 个 @import

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 使用 !important 声明时要小心

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Properties should be known (listed in CSS3 specification) or be a vendor-prefixed property.
ast.target: 属性应为已知属性（列于 CSS3 规范中）或带有厂商前缀的属性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Assure properties are in alphabetical order
ast.target: 确保属性按字母顺序排列

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use of outline: none or outline: 0 should be limited to :focus rules.
ast.target: outline: none 或 outline: 0 的使用应仅限于 :focus 规则。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Selectors that look like regular expressions are slow and should be avoided.
ast.target: 看起来像正则表达式的选择器很慢，应避免使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Track how many rules there are.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Will warn when selector count is >= 3800 selectors.
ast.target: 当选择器数量 >= 3800 时将发出警告。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Will error when selector count is > 4095.
ast.target: 当选择器数量 > 4095 时将报错。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: New-line characters in selectors are usually a forgotten comma and not a descendant combinator.
ast.target: 选择器中的换行符通常是漏掉了逗号，而不是后代组合符。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks for the star property hack (targets IE6/7)
ast.target: 检查星号属性 hack（针对 IE6/7）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks for text indent less than -99px
ast.target: 检查 text-indent 小于 -99px 的情况

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks for the underscore property hack (targets IE6)
ast.target: 检查下划线属性 hack（针对 IE6）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The universal selector (*) is known to be slow.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Unqualified attribute selectors are known to be slow.
ast.target: 不限定的属性选择器已知较慢。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When using a vendor-prefixed property, make sure to include the standard one.
ast.target: 使用带厂商前缀的属性时，务必包含标准属性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You don't need to specify units when a value is 0.
ast.target: 当值为 0 时无需指定单位。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: View wiki documentation to learn more features
ast.target: 查看 wiki 文档 以了解更多功能

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After registration, clicking files will open directly in the code editor. Reload plugin after changes
ast.target: 注册后，点击文件将直接在代码编辑器中打开。修改后需重载插件
